user_feedback:
when the game is paused, I don't want to see the game be grayed out or see any paused press esc to resume 

but I also don't want the hud/cursor to disappear when the game is paused
analysis:
- Issue identified: When the game is paused (GAME_PHASES.PAUSED), the cursor is not being rendered. The renderCursor(p) call only happens in the PLAYING phase, causing the cursor to disappear when paused.
- Files affected: game.js
- Changes needed: Add renderCursor(p) to the PAUSED case in the draw function to ensure the cursor remains visible when the game is paused. No gray overlay or pause text exists in the current code, so nothing needs to be removed.
